water_bodies.name: Lake Balkhash
water_bodies.notes: Largest lake in Kazakhstan. Western part is fresh, eastern is saline. Best fishing: spring and autumn.

water_bodies.name: Kapchagai Reservoir
water_bodies.notes: Popular fishing spot near Almaty. Warm water supports catfish and carp in summer.

water_bodies.name: Irtysh River
water_bodies.notes: Major river in East Kazakhstan. Cold water favors pike and perch. Best in spring and autumn.

water_bodies.name: Ishim River (Astana)
water_bodies.notes: Flows through the capital. Urban fishing with pike and perch. Accessible year-round including ice fishing in winter.

water_bodies.name: Ural River
water_bodies.notes: One of the best fishing rivers in Western Kazakhstan. Famous for large zander and catfish.

water_bodies.name: Bukhtarma Reservoir
water_bodies.notes: Large mountain reservoir in East Kazakhstan. Cold, clear water. Excellent for pike and zander. High altitude — lower pressure baseline.
